cv.name: Muhammad Syahendra Anindyantoro
cv.title: Frontend Developer
cv.paragraph_1: I am Muhammad Syahendra Anindyantoro a Frontend Developer or Frontend Engineer with a Bachelor's degree in Electrical Engineering and 6 years of experience in IT. I have expertise in using modern technologies such as React and Vue to develop interactive, detailed, and high-quality user interfaces.
cv.paragraph_2: My strengths are that I am a hardworking person. I like teams because I can get the job done quickly. I'm a fast learner, and I like challenges. however, I'm not a very good speaker so I'm used to getting to know and building teams so I can communicate well.
cv.paragraph_3: With a combination of technical expertise, interpersonal skills, and a passion for learning, I remain committed to my work.

education.ums: Bachelor's degree, Electrical Engineering (Strong Current) at Universitas Muhammadiyah Surakarta, GPA: 3.39

workExperiences.desc: Developed the Insira funeral booking ecosystem, managing and developing three separate applications: Petugas (Staff), Client, and the core Insira platform.

project.paragraph: Built and managed Petugas, Insira, and Client Insira applications_Implemented interactive layouts and maps API integration_Optimized state management and query performance across apps.

workExperiences.desc: Developing a funeral booking app called the Insira app. Develop apps.

project.paragraph: Implemented UI/UX designs_built new features_fixed existing bugs.

workExperiences.desc: Developed the Scyllax TPM (Trade Promotion Management) App using Vue 3, worked on the Annual Budget and Approval Schema modules

project.paragraph: Implemented UI/UX designs_built new features_fixed existing bugs.

workExperiences.desc: Developed interactive web pages using Vue and React.

cv.name: Muhammad Syahendra Anindyantoro
cv.title: Frontend Developer
cv.paragraph_1: Saya Muhammad Syahendra Anindyantoro seorang Frontend Developer atau Frontend Engineer dengan latar belakang pendidikan Sarjana Teknik Elektro dan pengalaman selama 6 tahun di dunia IT. Saya memiliki keahlian dalam menggunakan teknologi modern seperti React dan Vue untuk mengembangkan antarmuka pengguna yang interaktif, detail, dan berkualitas tinggi.
cv.paragraph_2: Saya pekerja keras. Saya menyukai kerja tim karena dapat menyelesaikan pekerjaan dengan cepat. Saya dapat beradaptasi dengan cepat dan menyukai tantangan. Namun kekurangannya saya tidak pandai berbicara, oleh karena itu saya membiasakan diri untuk mengenal dan membangun tim agar bisa berkomunikasi dengan baik.
cv.paragraph_3: Dengan kombinasi keahlian teknis, kemampuan interpersonal, dan semangat belajar yang tinggi, Saya terus berkomitmen pada pekerjaan saya.

education.ums: Sarjana Teknik Elektro (Arus Kuat) di Universitas Muhammadiyah Surakarta, IPK: 3.39

workExperiences.desc: Mengembangkan ekosistem aplikasi pemakaman Insira, mengelola dan mengembangkan tiga aplikasi terpisah: Petugas, Client, dan platform utama Insira.

project.paragraph: Membangun dan mengelola aplikasi Petugas, Insira, dan Client Insira_Mengimplementasikan layout interaktif dan integrasi maps API_Mengoptimalkan manajemen state dan performa query di seluruh aplikasi.
